context: Tests whether the agent routes a chat-feature question to pubnub-chat with the chat SDK docs MCP tool, using the canonical 5-line handoff template and producing no implementation code.

checklist.name: Uses Intent line
checklist.description: Output contains a line starting with 'Intent' (followed by a colon) that restates the user's goal in one sentence

checklist.name: Uses Skill line
checklist.description: Output contains a line starting with 'Skill' (followed by a colon)

checklist.name: Uses MCP tool line
checklist.description: Output contains a line starting with 'MCP tool' (followed by a colon)

checklist.name: MCP tool is get_chat_sdk_documentation
checklist.description: The MCP tool line names get_chat_sdk_documentation

checklist.name: Uses Docs source line
checklist.description: Output contains a line starting with 'Docs source' (followed by a colon) referencing the Chat SDK docs or equivalent

checklist.name: Uses Next step line
checklist.description: Output contains a line starting with 'Next step' (followed by a colon) with one concrete actionable suggestion

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: Output contains no code blocks (no triple-backtick blocks of JavaScript, Python, or other language implementations of the requested feature)

checklist.name: Single handoff only
checklist.description: Output contains exactly one handoff block, not multiple chained handoffs covering separate intents

checklist.name: Does not paraphrase specialist content
checklist.description: Output does not restate large portions of pubnub-chat's content; it routes to it rather than reproducing its instructions
